summary: Pass: commit 60782129 is a test-only change that adds the requested temporary characterization for IntegrationCoordinator.postDispatchJournal, proves a DISPATCH-<batchId> orchestrator journal is created outside the canonical slip/invoice linkage, includes the required removal-target comment, and leaves production code untouched while recorded validations stayed green.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission validation contract already defines the final canonicalization end-state (VAL-ORCH-001/002/004), while this freeze feature intentionally captures the pre-removal legacy behavior as a temporary truthsuite test.
sharedStateObservations.suggestedChange: When remove-noncanonical-dispatch-path lands, delete TS_O2COrchestratorDispatchCharacterizationTest and replace it with permanent assertions that no orchestrator DISPATCH-* journal path remains.
